c74object.name: video~
c74object.digest: Record screen synchronized to audio input and output MP4
c74object.description: The `video~` object captures Windows desktop screen activity and synchronizes it with the audio signal received at its inlet. When a 1 is received, it starts recording. When a 0 is received, it stops recording and muxes the captured video and audio into a high-quality MP4 file using ffmpeg.

inlet.digest: Inlet 1 (signal): Audio signal and control messages (1 to start, 0 to stop)
inlet.description: Accepts an audio signal to record, as well as messages 1 (start) or 0 (stop) to control the recording lifecycle.

outlet.description: Outputs status symbols such as 'started', 'stopped [path]', or 'error [msg]'.
Outputs detailed diagnostic messages and logging information.

objarg.name: save-path
objarg.description: The directory where the final MP4 videos will be saved. Uses forward slashes (e.g. C:/Users/Videos). If not provided, videos are saved in the same directory as the external itself.

method.name: int
method.description: Receiving a 1 starts recording the screen and audio. Receiving a 0 stops the recording and generates the MP4 file.

method.name: float
method.description: Receiving a 1.0 starts recording. Receiving a 0.0 stops recording.

method.name: path
method.digest: Set the output directory path for the next recording
method.description: Sets the directory path where the MP4 video will be saved. The change takes effect the next time a 1 is received to start recording.
